iti66:1.3: "Tīṇimāni, bhikkhave, soceyyāni. Katamāni tīṇi? Kāyasoceyyaṁ, vacīsoceyyaṁ, manosoceyyaṁ – imāni kho, bhikkhave, tīṇi soceyyānī"ti. Etamatthaṁ bhagavā avoca. Tatthetaṁ iti vuccati:
iti66:1.4:
"Kāyasuciṁ vacīsuciṁ,
cetosucimanāsavaṁ;
Suciṁ soceyyasampannaṁ,
āhu sabbappahāyinan"ti.
iti66:1.5:
Ayampi attho vutto bhagavatā, iti me sutanti.
Sattamaṁ.
